title: libinput bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.19.3-7]
- Fix crash when the Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd gen sends absolute wheel events

[1.19.3-6]
- Add support for the Wacom Intuos Pro (RHEL-105483)
- Rename existing patches for better order clarity
full_text:
[1.19.3-7]
- Fix crash when the Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd gen sends absolute wheel events

[1.19.3-6]
- Add support for the Wacom Intuos Pro (RHEL-105483)
- Rename existing patches for better order clarity

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-15895.html
